query: Owl Creek Chase cross country ski race Aspen

videos.title: The Owl Creek Chase - Cross-Country Ski Race
videos.description: Featuring both a classic race and a skate race, the Owl Creek Chase is a 25 kilometer race from Snowmass to Aspen. Today's Daly Dose of Snowmass highlights this intense cross-country event.

videos.title: Aspen Owl Creek Chase
videos.channel: City of Aspen Parks & Recreation Department
videos.description: The Owl Creek Chase has been one of Colorado's premier cross-country ski races.  The challenging course from Snowmass Village to Aspen presents the very best that Colorado skiing has to offer: tough climbs, scenic views, thrilling descents, and excellent snow conditions.

videos.title: City of Aspen Owl Creek Chase
videos.channel: City of Aspen Parks & Recreation Department
videos.description: The Owl Creek Chase Nordic Ski Race - 21K Classic and Skate Ski Race. For non-racers we have a 15K Tour. Learn more about this 30+ year old race go to www.AspenSpecialEvents.com.

videos.title: 2011 Owl Creek Chase
videos.channel: City of Aspen Parks & Recreation Department
videos.description: Clips from the 2011 Owl Creek Chase - Colorado's largest and most premier nordic ski race!

videos.title: Owl Creek Chase 21k 2020 Cross Country Ski Race!
videos.description:
Owl Creek Chase 21k 2020 Cross Country Ski Race in Aspen Colorado! Filmed with my go pro and sony I made a race day vlog to film and show some of the fun races that we have here in Colorado and Utah. I hope you enjoy and have a great day!

This is a very edited down video of the race.  Thanks for watching!

Thanks for everyone who helped put this race together and I highly recommend it for anyone next year!

Let me know if you have any questions about the race, skis, gear, conditions, etc. in the comments below. Also any feed back on the video would be great!

Sorry for the wind noise, its a first edition GoPro so I tried to hide it with loud songs.

Contact for business inquiries: eriklynchskis@gmail.com

Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/eriklynchskis/

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eriklynch_ski

Thanks! 

I hope you get some great skiing!!

videos.title: Owl Creek Chase Josh's finish
videos.description: 21K skate ski race from Snowmass to Aspen

videos.title: 2014 North American Vasa XC 27K Ski Race
videos.description: The biggest race in Michigan's Lower Peninsula! It was much colder than predicted, but the sun was shining and there was ample snow. Once again NordicSkiRacer.com Master Skier Doug Cornell rocks the head-cam to tunes by The Dirt Surfers.

videos.title: 2014 Boulder Lake Cross Country Ski Race
videos.description:
Short video of the 2014 Boulder Lake Ski Race presented by Salomon near Duluth MN. Taken at about the 10 km mark. www.BoulderLakeSkiRace.com. 2015 race date will be Sunday, Jan 18th. Choose 31 km/11 km skate/classic
or 10 km/5 km snowshoe or the duathlon.
